title: Mitsrayim #4714
definition:
Egypt = "land of the Copts"

 n pr loc
 1) a country at the northeastern section of Africa, adjacent to
    Palestine, and through which the Nile flows

 Egyptians = "double straits"

 adj
 2) the inhabitants or natives of Egypt
nasbUsage:
Definition: Egypt = "land of the Copts"

 n pr loc
 1) a country at the northeastern section of Africa, adjacent to
    Palestine, and through which the Nile flows

 Egyptians = "double straits"

 adj
 2) the inhabitants or natives of Egypt

    NASB:  a son of Ham, also his desc. and their country in N.W. Africa
